description: Composition:Black t-shirt in 100% cottonWash care: Light machine wash Warm iron on reverse   Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub, bleach or dry clean Fitting:Comfort FitBring out the cool attitude in you with this black t-shirt from inkfruit. It goes well with smart casuals and is an ideal wear for college, outings with friends or for nights out with the girls.Model statistics:1.
